_comment: Localization data for i18n.py, loaded at import. 'languages' is the Language selector list. 'strings' groups translations by SEMANTIC context/domain (like gettext msgctxt): strings[domain][NAME] has a generic 'context' note and a language->text map. A domain is a MEANING, not an app — a word with one meaning lives in one domain (e.g. the shared 'time' vocab), and is duplicated only when its meaning differs by context (weather HIGH = a level, tides HIGH = high tide). Apps translate via the relevant domain; the 'common' domain (OFFLINE, ERROR, …) backs every context. A missing (domain, NAME, language) falls back to the English NAME, and a regional variant (pt-BR) inherits its base language (pt). 'duration_units' (D/H/M/S symbols) and 'holidays' stay flat; 'base_currency'/'country' are the default a language implies when no Location is set. Only Windows-1252 (Western/Latin-1) languages. Edit here to fix/add translations.

Invalid date.context: A configured date could not be parsed.

API fail.context: Status: an upstream API call failed.

Configure.context: Prompt to configure the app in Settings.

App error.context: Fallback page on the flaps: the app raised an error.

Plugin error.context: Fallback page on the flaps: the plugin could not be served.

Not loaded.context: Fallback page on the flaps: the app failed to import.

Not found.context: Fallback page on the flaps: no such app id.

Unknown type.context: Fallback page on the flaps: manifest type is neither channel nor functional.

remaining.context: Follows a duration to mean time remaining ('3D REMAINING').

Arrived.context: Shown when an awaited moment has arrived.

Here.context: Short 'it's here' when an awaited moment arrives.

Celebrate.context: Celebratory word shown when an event arrives.

Party.context: Celebratory word shown when an event arrives.

Y.context: Compact duration suffix for years (after a number, e.g. '2A').

Not yet.context: An awaited event is still in the future.

Tomorrow.context: The day label on an event happening tomorrow, e.g. 'Tomorrow 3:30PM'. A time follows it on the same line, so it must stay short.

Up.context: Very short label for sunrise (sun is up).

Dn.context: Very short label for sunset (sun is down).

lit.context: Precedes the percentage of a surface that is illuminated, e.g. '16% LIT'.

Full in.context: 'FULL IN 3D' = time until something is full (e.g. the moon).

New in.context: 'NEW IN 3D' = time until something is new (e.g. the moon).

Rain.context: Forecast: rain. A '-' or '+' is appended for light/heavy (max 6 chars).

Snow.context: Forecast: snow. A '-' or '+' is appended for light/heavy (max 6 chars).

Current conditions.context: Generic label for present weather conditions.

Fair.context: Qualitative level: fair (between good and moderate).

PSunny.context: Forecast: partly sunny / partly cloudy (max 6 chars).

Sleet.context: Forecast: sleet or freezing rain (max 6 chars).

Forecast.context: Header of the multi-day forecast page. Must fit a 15-column wall.

Spot price.context: Label for a current spot (market) price.

Check station.context: Prompt to pick/verify a measurement station.

in space.context: Suffix after a count: 'N people in space'.

Leader.context: The leader / person in first place.

Calendar.context: The Calendar app's own name, shown as a heading above the next event.

No events.context: Status: the calendar has nothing coming up in the look-ahead window.

translations.fr: Journée de la vérité et réconciliation
